captures.response_content_type: text/event-stream (streamed answer); side calls /api/project/recommend_next_steps_after_ask (POST), /api/is_login, /api/project/my as JSON
captures.transport_protocol: SSE (streaming agent answer over ask_proxy POST). Auxiliary REST JSON for login/project/recommendations.
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard. Endpoint is /api/agent/ask_proxy POST returning a streamed (SSE-style) sequence of agent step/delta events that the Nuxt client renders into .step-bubble / .markdown-viewer. Final assistant text observed in DOM: '안녕하세요, 반갑습니다!'. Raw frame bytes require CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE event delimiting (presumed newline/data: framing for ask_proxy stream); not byte-confirmed (taint-guard). Needs CDP/HAR for exact separator.
captures.dom_render_structure: Nuxt SPA (#__nuxt, window.__NUXT__). No custom elements — plain divs. Container: div.main-inner.j-chat-agent > div.general-chat-wrapper.j-general-chat-wrapper > div.chat-wrapper. Messages: user = div.bubble with div.message-actions-user; assistant = div.step-bubble > div.markdown-viewer (rendered markdown).
captures.framework: Nuxt 3 (cdn-static.genspark.ai/_nuxt/*, window.__NUXT__ present). Vue under the hood (no data-v-app exposed at root but Nuxt confirmed).
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; all /api/* calls 200, no functional errors observed.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. Chat POST = /api/agent/ask_proxy (200), streamed. Workspace 4.0 'agents' UI; on submit it spins up an agent conversation (URL -> /agents?id=...). Answer rendered normally. Logged in. Wire bytes taint-guarded; CDP/HAR needed for exact SSE envelope.
